baseline.reason: Correctly identifies the UAF root cause: sip_subscribe_remove frees subscribe, then assert(1 == subscribe->ref) accesses freed memory. Trigger path is accurate. Misses explicitly noting the 'Expires: 0' trigger condition that gates this code path, but is otherwise precise.

vastdb.reason: Correctly identifies the UAF root cause and traces the full trigger path from sip_uac_subscribe_onreply through sip_subscribe_remove to free(subscribe) followed by the dangling ref access at line 449. Also correctly notes the 'Expires: 0' header trigger. Same minor omission as baseline (no mention of the double-free at line 452), but fully accurate.
